zh.lifeSummary: Morgan Gwyn於1476年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安別易迪。他於1507年與Mrs. Morgan在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安別易迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan) and Irish: variant of   Gwin   or   Gwynne  .

variants.name: Gwin
meanings: Welsh: from gwyn ‘fair, white’, also sometimes ‘white-headed; favorite’. This word was widely used as a personal name in the Middle Ages. It may also be a nickname for a person with fair hair or a noticeably pale complexion. See also Winn .

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

en.lifeSummary: Morgan Gwyn was born in 1476, in Llanboidy, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He married Mrs. Morgan in 1507, in Llanboidy, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan Gwynは1476年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランボイディで生まれた。1507年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランボイディでMrs. Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan Gwyn(은)는 1476년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜보이디에서 태어났다. 그는 1507년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜보이디에서 Mrs. Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.
